title: SQL: cast(now() as date) in default fails
key_bug_features: default value using cast(now() as date)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id serial, d date DEFAULT cast(now() as date), name varchar(50));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id serial, d date DEFAULT NULL, description text);
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
